name: Tomatoes & Kale Side Dish Vegan
recipeIngredient: 16 oz Tomatoes, Canned, cut, in juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut or tear kale into bite-sized pieces.
2. Place the kale in a colander and rinse under running water. Do not drain thoroughly; keep some water on the leaves.
3. Place the washed kale in a non-stick frying pan over medium heat and stir until wilted.
4. When the kale is wilted but still green, add the ready-cut tomatoes (with juice) to the pan.
5. Sprinkle the Italian seasoning over the mixture and continue stirring for a few moments until heated through.
6. Add reserved tomato juice to taste; more juice will make a soup-like dish, while less will result in a traditional side dish.
